name: perf budget: meta.budget.suppress_warnings=true opts out of the warning
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule slow-suppressed --in "$PWD/file.js" --enforce-budget 2>out.txt; ! grep -E 'budget exceeded' out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup: for i in $(seq 1 1000); do echo "const x${i}=${i};" >> file.js; done
